еҰӮжһңдҪ иҜҙзҡ„ **Codex и®ҫзҪ® Pack** жҳҜжҢҮдҪ еҗҺйқўжүҖжңүйЎ№зӣ®пјҲPMгҖҒжһ¶жһ„еёҲгҖҒеӣһиҪ¬зӘ‘гҖҒжҠ•иө„з ”з©¶гҖҒAI AgentгҖҒиҮӘеҠЁеҢ–зі»з»ҹпјүз»ҹдёҖдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„ **Codex Task Pack жЁЎжқҝ**пјҢе»әи®®зӣҙжҺҘйҮҮз”ЁдёӢйқўиҝҷеҘ—ж ҮеҮҶгҖӮ

иҝҷеҘ—жҳҜжҢүз…§дҪ зӣ®еүҚзҡ„зӣ®ж Үи®ҫи®Ўзҡ„пјҡ

## йҖӮеҗҲдҪ зҡ„еўһејәзүҲ

еҹәдәҺдҪ зӣ®еүҚи·ҜзәҝпјҲPM + жһ¶жһ„еёҲ + Codex + жҠ•иө„ + еӣһиҪ¬зӘ‘пјүпјҡ

е»әи®®еҶҚеҠ дёҖдёӘпјҡ

```yaml
skills/
```

зӣ®еҪ•пјҡ

```yaml
skills/

в”ңв”Җв”Җ pm.skill
в”ңв”Җв”Җ architect.skill
в”ңв”Җв”Җ codex.skill
в”ңв”Җв”Җ finance.skill
в”ңв”Җв”Җ kiln.skill
в””в”Җв”Җ strategy.skill
```

з„¶еҗҺеңЁпјҡ

```text
~/.codex/skills/
```

з»ҹдёҖеҠ иҪҪгҖӮ

иҝҷж ·дҪ д»ҘеҗҺеҸӘйңҖиҰҒиҜҙпјҡ

```text
ејҖе§Ӣ PM W01D01

ејҖе§Ӣ жһ¶жһ„еёҲ W01D01

ејҖе§Ӣ Codex W01D01

ејҖе§Ӣ еӣһиҪ¬зӘ‘ W01D01
```

Codex е°ұдјҡиҮӘеҠЁпјҡ

1. иҜ»еҸ–еҜ№еә” skill
2. и°ғз”ЁеҜ№еә” workflow
3. жӣҙж–° Notion
4. з”ҹжҲҗеӯҰд№ д»»еҠЎ
5. иҫ“еҮәж—ҘжҠҘ
6. еҮҶеӨҮ Nitrosend йӮ®д»¶еҶ…е®№

иҝҷеҹәжң¬е°ұжҳҜдҪ д№ӢеүҚжҸҗеҲ°зҡ„вҖңдёӘдәәеўһй•ҝж“ҚдҪңзі»з»ҹпјҲPersonal Growth OSпјүвҖқзҡ„ж ҮеҮҶ Pack з»“жһ„гҖӮ

IвҖҷm sharing this because the landscape of **local LLM stacks for personal and team use** is rapidly evolving вҖ” there are three practical paths you can take, each with its own balance of ease of use, performance, and flexibility. оҲҖciteоҲӮturn0search4оҲӮturn0search6оҲҒ

оҲҖimage_groupоҲӮ{"layout":"carousel","aspect_ratio":"1:1","query":["Ollama local LLM interface","LM Studio local AI application","llama.cpp inference on laptop","local LLM models gguf quantization"],"num_per_query":1}оҲҒ

**Quick snapshot of the three lanes youвҖҷll actually care about:**

- **Nearly вҖңplug and playвҖқ with marketplace models:** оҲҖentityоҲӮ["url","Ollama docs","http[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]"]оҲҒ is a CLIвҖ‘first tool that lets you *pull and run models by name* with very minimal setup and a builtвҖ‘in local API; great if you want something usable *this week* without wrestling with lowвҖ‘level formats. Ollama uses **llama.cpp under the hood** and even has an official Docker image. оҲҖciteоҲӮturn0search34оҲҒ

- **DesktopвҖ‘friendly with GUI + daemon + SDKs:** оҲҖentityоҲӮ["url","LM Studio docs","http[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]"]оҲҒ adds a polished **GUI for exploring and downloading models**, plus a **headless daemon (`llmster`) and SDKs for Python/JS** вҖ” so you can start locally and scale into programmatic or server deployments. It supports GPU acceleration across platforms and OpenAIвҖ‘compatible APIs. оҲҖciteоҲӮturn0search4оҲӮturn0search6оҲҒ

- **Raw, lightweight engine for max performance & minimal deps:** At the core of most stacks is **оҲҖentityоҲӮ["software","llama.cpp","inference engine"]оҲҒ**, a *pure CPU/ARM first* LLM inference runtime with minimal dependencies and broad quantization support (e.g., GGUF / 4вҖ‘bit) that lets you squeeze out the most performance on lowвҖ‘VRAM or ARM machines. ItвҖҷs ideal for privacyвҖ‘focused setups or systems without NVIDIA GPUs. оҲҖciteоҲӮturn0search38оҲӮturn0search27оҲҒ

**Fast suggestion:**  
If you want a *private LLM stack running by the end of the week*, start with **Ollama** or **LM Studio** вҖ” they give you вҖңfastest path to running.вҖқ If you need **maximum performance with the leanest footprint** (e.g., no GPU or low VRAM), go deeper with **llama.cppвҖҷs Docker quantization workflows**. оҲҖciteоҲӮturn0search4оҲҒ

Let me know if you want stepвҖ‘byвҖ‘step setup commands for any of these!
